product: Genie entity matching and point map support
tagline: Increased entity matching support in Genie: Each entity matching (previously value dictionary) column in Genie now supports 1024 values per column, up from 255.
what_it_does: Increased entity matching support in Genie: Each entity matching (previously value dictionary) column in Genie now supports 1024 values per column, up from 255. Click Refresh on your existing entity matching columns to increase cardinality support. Point maps support in Genie: Point maps are now supported in Genie.
why_it_matters: Improve Genie Agent accuracy and reliability by adding example SQL queries, Unity Catalog functions, plain text instructions, and knowledge store snippets (table descriptions, JOIN relationships, and SQL expressions for business semantics).

capabilities.title: Fiscal year starts in February
capabilities.desc: Fiscal year starts in February, for example fiscal year 26 or FY26 is February 1, 2026 through January 31, 2027

key_takeaway: Increased entity matching support in Genie: Each entity matching (previously value dictionary) column in Genie now supports 1024 values per column, up from 255.
